text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Early morning shoots should be abolished... I can't
get enough sleep.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to nap a bit... before practice. I'll wake
up in time... Maybe...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Shut up... Just let me sleep.

Gold City ends up sleeping through her training
session.
